sections.label: Introduction
sections.instruction: Make a bold first impression. This is your headline statement.

fields.name: roles
fields.label: Roles (animated)
fields.instruction: Comma-separated — these cycle in the animation.
fields.placeholder: Backend Engineer, Cloud Architect, Open Source Dev

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: Tagline
fields.instruction: One punchy sentence that defines your work.
fields.placeholder: Building systems that scale to millions.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.instruction: 2-3 sentences about your background and expertise.
fields.placeholder: I design and build robust backend systems and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about open source and high-availability architectures.

fields.name: yearsExp
fields.label: Years of Experience
fields.instruction: Shown as a stat in the hero. E.g. '5+' or '7'.

fields.name: projectCount
fields.label: Projects Shipped
fields.instruction: Shown as a stat in the hero. E.g. '30+'.

fields.name: techCount
fields.label: Technologies Mastered
fields.instruction: Shown as a stat in the hero. E.g. '15+'.

fields.name: resumeLink
fields.label: Resume
fields.instruction: Upload your resume as a PDF (max 5MB).

sections.label: Work Experience
sections.instruction: Add your professional history. You can add up to 8 roles.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: Key responsibilities and achievements. Numbers help.
fields.placeholder: Designed and maintained payment processing APIs handling $1B+ in annual transactions...

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills Used
fields.instruction: Type a skill and press Enter to add.

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Showcase your best work. Add 1 to 6 projects.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: What it does and why it matters.
fields.placeholder: A high-throughput task queue built on Redis, supporting millions of jobs per day with zero data loss...

fields.name: stack
fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.instruction: Type a technology and press Enter to add.

fields.name: images
fields.label: Project Screenshot
fields.instruction: Upload one screenshot or banner image for this project.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Type a skill and press Enter to add.
